channel.title: Go Humble! RSS Books
channel.description: Awesome RSS Feeds about HumbleBundle books bundles!

item.title: And the Winner Is: Award Winning Fantasy, Science Fiction, & Horror from Tachyon
item.content:encoded: Here at Humble, we only want to give you the best of the best, and for our more discerning readers we’ve crafted a bundle of sci-fi, fantasy, and horror ebooks from Tachyon that aren’t just great reads, but award-winning modern classics! Dive into tales of technology and terror from genre-blending master Peter Watts in his short story collection Beyond the Rift! Wartime history and B-movie schlock combine in James Morrow’s World War II kaiju extravaganza Shambling Towards Hiroshima! An utterly unique voice takes on worlds beyond our own in Ellen Klages’ haunting short story collection Portable Childhoods! There is so much more to discover in this collection of fiction from some of today’s most daring authors, so grab these books while you can at the price of your choice, and support Doctors Without Borders with your purchase!

item.title: Robyn Carr's Virgin River
item.content:encoded:
Enter a quiet mountain town where things are a lot more complicated than they seem on the surface with this 21-ebook bundle of Robyn Carr’s bestselling Virgin River—the series that inspired the hit Netflix show! Meet a recently widowed nurse as she attempts to fit in with the residents of the remote California town while also caring for an abandoned infant in the very first novel Virgin River. Follow along as a former Marine saves a woman on the run with her young child in Shelter Mountain. Root for the town’s first resident cop as he attempts to settle down with the gal who’s stolen his heart in Whispering Rock. Imagine yourself cozied up by the fire inside the mountain cabin of your dreams with a hot chocolate in one hand and this ebook bundle in the other. Pay what you want for the entire series, and support Room to Read with your purchase!

The titles in this bundle are available through Kobo.com. To access the content, create or log in to your Kobo.com account.

item.title: The Unity Game Development Mastery Bundle by Zenva
item.description: Start your game dev journey with Zenva
item.content:encoded: Learn the knowledge you need to succeed in modern game development with a little help from the pros at Zenva. Pay what you want for instructor-recorded courses, practice exams, mini-project games to further build your skills, and more. Get up to speed quickly with lessons like Intermediate Design Patterns in C# with Unity 6 and Create a 2D Platformer in Unity: Build a Side-Scrolling Game from Scratch before it’s too late! Realize your artistic vision in 3D or 2D and help support Alzheimer's Research UK!

item.title: Tad Williams: Otherland, Osten Ard, and More by DAW Books
item.content:encoded: Experience the boundless imagination of best-selling science fiction and fantasy author Tad Williams with this vast collection of eBooks. Feel hums of energy radiating off the page with the techno-thriller City of Golden Shadow—your intro to the acclaimed Otherland series, where vast conspiracies harness wondrous VR worlds for wicked ends. Journey into Williams’ beloved fantasy world of Osten Ard with the The Witchwood Crown. Unlock 20+ amazing eBooks all for a price you choose, and help support the ACLU with your purchase!

item.title: Professor DM's Dungeon Crawl Classics Essentials Bundle Presented by Dungeon Craft
item.description: This one’s for the dungeon crawlers
item.content:encoded:
If you’re an avid follower of Dungeon Craft or simply want to test your mettle on a new adventure, you’ll want to snag this bundle of TTRPG rulebooks, adventures, inspiration manuals, and more presented by the one, the only Professor DM! In this library of over 100 ebooks and PDFs, you’ll find Dungeon Crawl Classics adventures like The Croaking Fane and Intrigue at the Court of Chaos, eldritch alphabets, how-to manuals, horror and romance tales, and a lot more—even hard copies of four random adventures with your purchase! This bundle has everything you need and more to kick off your next campaign, so get it now at the price of your choice, and support St. Jude Children’s Hospital!

The titles in this bundle are available through DTRPG.

Keys expire. Please redeem your digital tier keys before June 29th, 2027, and your physical tier key before December 31st, 2026.

item.title: Professor DM's Dungeon Crawl Classics Essentials Bundle Presented by Dungeon Craft
item.description: This one’s for the dungeon crawlers
item.content:encoded:
If you’re an avid follower of Dungeon Craft or simply want to test your mettle on a new adventure, you’ll want to snag this bundle of TTRPG rulebooks, adventures, inspiration manuals, and more presented by the one, the only Professor DM! In this library of over 100 ebooks and PDFs, you’ll find Dungeon Crawl Classics adventures like The Croaking Fane and Intrigue at the Court of Chaos, eldritch alphabets, how-to manuals, horror and romance tales, and a lot more—even hard copies of four random adventures with your purchase! This bundle has everything you need and more to kick off your next campaign, so get it now at the price of your choice, and support St. Jude Children’s Hospital!

The titles in this bundle are available through DTRPG.

Keys expire. Please redeem your digital tier keys before June 29th, 2027, and your physical tier key before December 31st, 2026.

item.title: Roll Big or Go Home 2
item.content:encoded:
Become the main character of your favorite novel, film series, or game with this giant bundle of tabletop roleplaying books! This TTRPG library features core rulebooks and adventures set in tons of different franchises, from Doctor Who and Warhammer to Cthulhu, Transformers, and even My Little Pony! Basically, if you’re a fan of something, it’s probably in here. You’ll also find core books from classic roleplaying franchises like Return to Dark Tower and original storylines like Household and Visigoths vs. Mall Goths! Assemble your friends, grab a set of dice, and pick from over 50 TTRPG books to plan your next one-night adventure or neverending campaign. Grab this bundle now for the price of your choosing, and support Tabletop Gaymers with your purchase!

Keys expire. All titles should be redeemed before June 25, 2027.

item.title: Embroidery, Sashiko, and Decorative Stitching by Open Road
item.description: This bundle will have you in stitches
item.content:encoded: Level up your stitching game with this bundle of instruction and inspiration books from Open Road! Learn the basics of sashiko, kogin, thread painting, and tons of other embroidery techniques to turn simple fabric crafts into heirloom masterpieces! Try a new stitch every day with Sashiko 365, master the embroidery patterns in The Ultimate Kogin Collection, sample the gorgeous greenery in 200 Embroidered Flowers, turn fabric into a canvas with A-Z of Thread Painting, and so much more! This bundle has 17 ebooks with patterns and inspo for just about everything, so let your imagination run wild! Choose what you pay for all of these great books, and support Make A Wish with your purchase.

item.title: Cyberpunk RED: The Ready-to-Run Essentials Bundle
item.description: Take it to the Edge, choomba
item.content:encoded:
In the digital dystopia of the future, you’re crammed with chrome and calling the shots. Set your next tabletop adventure in the neon-drenched streets of Night City with these Cyberpunk RED TTRPG essentials! This bundle is chock-full of maps, cross-platform bundles of rulebooks and tools, mission kits, and more resources for planning your next campaign in the world of Cyberpunk and turning your friends into the Edgerunners they were always meant to be. Bring down the corpos and take Night City for yourselves with this great bundle, and support Tabletop Gaymers with your purchase at the price of your choosing!

Keys Expire. Please redeem before June 30th, 2027.

item.title: Python: The Good Stuff by No Starch
item.description: Unlock The Good Stuff for Python
item.content:encoded: Pick up the pace in life when you start using Python to power up your programming output. Learn coding quickly with Python Crash Course, speed up and simplify your life with Automate the Boring Stuff with Python, create AI that learns from vast amounts of data with Practical Deep Learning, or start bending Excel to your will with Python for Excel Users. Pay what you want for A+ eBooks that help your career grow, and help support the Python Software Foundation with your purchase!

item.title: The Ultimate ABLAZE Manga Collection
item.content:encoded: Manga library looking a little empty? We can fix that! We’ve teamed up with ABLAZE to bring you a huge bundle of the publisher’s most beloved manga, manhwa, and pinoy manga ebook series and collections, perfect for oldheads and new fans alike! Dive into the cutthroat world of professional chess (and pick up a few moves as you read) in Blitz! Discover the mystery of a hidden painting in JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure one-shot Rohan at the Louvre! Jump back in time to one of the O.G.s of science fiction manga (and one of director James Cameron’s favorite characters) in the Captain Harlock collection! That’s only a taste of what we have in store for you in this mega manga bonanza, so grab it now at the price of your choosing, and support Starlight Children’s Foundation with your purchase!

item.title: Kodansha Presents: BL, Yuri & More from Ichijinsha
item.description: Get over $1200 worth of BL, Yuri & Other Hit Ichijinsha Manga in one bundle
item.content:encoded:
The content in this bundle is intended for mature audiences.

Looking to bolster your digital manga collection with BL, Yuri and more while also saving big in the process? Get more than 100 digital volumes and over $1200 worth of fan-favorite series like How to Deal When Your Intimidating Neighbor is Actually an Omega, I Want to Love You Till Your Dying Day (Anime debuting this summer), and Wotakoi: Love is Hard for Otaku for only $30 with the Kodansha Presents: BL, Yuri & More from Ichijinsha bundle. A Humble-first, this bundle is the best way to experience Kodansha's Ichijinsha manga offerings while also supporting the Comic Book Legal Defense Fund—a non-profit organization dedicated to protecting the First Amendment rights of the comics art form and its community of retailers, creators, publishers, librarians, and readers.

item.title: The Free League RPG Collection
item.description: Fresh TTRPGs by Free League Publishing
item.content:encoded:
Ready to spice up your TTRPG collection with the hottest titles from Free League Publishing? Unlock the core set for Dragonbane, an exhilarating classic fantasy game full of magic, mystery, and adventure that offers “mirth and mayhem roleplaying,” aka hearty laughs and brutal challenges. Or brave Mutant: Year Zero, a post-apocalyptic tale of humanity’s crawl back from streets turned graveyards as godlike mutants roam the wasteland. Try these or Vaesen: A Wicked Secret, all for a price you choose, and help support Direct Relief with your purchase.

Codes are redeemable through the DriveThruRPG website.

item.title: The Ultimate Linux & SysAdmin Bundle
item.content:encoded: Learn the skills and gain the knowledge you need to succeed in system administration and development operations for Linux with this bundle of insightful courses by Packt. Inside this amazing curriculum, you’ll get expert insights on mastering AI networking, Windows 365, PowerShell scripting, and more. Deepen your understanding of SysAdmin and DevOps whether you’re a novice or a seasoned professional with courses like The Ultimate Linux Shell Scripting Guide, Microsoft Intune Cookbook - 2E and help support the Prevent Cancer Foundation with your purchase!

item.title: Lost Lands Adventure for 5th Edition by Frog God Games
item.description: Can you survive the Lost Lands?
item.content:encoded: Can you survive the Lost Lands? Gather your friends and roll the dice, because it’s time to journey into the Lost Lands! We’ve teamed up with Frog God Games for this massive TTRPG bundle chock-full of resources to plan your next campaign. Explore the winding streets of Bard’s Gate, a citadel of artisans and politicians whose people are menaced by dark forces within and without. Use the Tome of Artifacts to scatter magical weapons and relics throughout the land for your players to find. Find a starting point for your adventure with expanded description manuals like Rappan Athuk: Adventures in Zelkor’s Ferry. You can even score a physical copy of The World of the Lost Lands, the definitive guide to the entire setting, full of information on its locations, peoples, and historical data! Endless adventure awaits you in this bundle of nearly 80 TTRPG ebooks, so grab it now at the price of your choice and support Doctors Without Borders with your purchase!
